description_long: This is a large, black stereo sound system with a robust, angular front face featuring five prominent circular speaker grilles. The central grille is the largest and displays the gold 'BMB' logo, while two smaller grilles are symmetrically positioned on each side. The enclosure is constructed from a hard, matte-finished material, likely plastic or composite, with a subtle sheen. The rear panel is flat and includes a recessed connector plate with two visible terminals, suggesting speaker wire input. The sides are plain and boxy, and there are no visible control panels, buttons, or display screens on any surface.
description: A large, black stereo sound system with five circular speaker grilles and a gold 'BMB' logo on the front, featuring a robust, angular design and a rear connector plate.
description_view_0: The front view shows five circular speaker grilles, with the central grille being the largest and displaying the gold 'BMB' logo.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, boxy surface with the edges of the speaker grilles visible at the front.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a flat panel with a recessed connector plate containing two terminals, and no other features.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain surface and the side profile of the speaker grilles.
attribute_brand_logo: Gold 'BMB' logo centered on the largest front speaker grille, with bold uppercase letters.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Circular, fine mesh pattern on all five speaker grilles, with a slightly convex surface and no additional decorative elements.
